user.title: Set up openHASP Manager
user.description: Enter the MQTT topic prefix for your openHASP plate. This is usually 'hasp/' followed by the plate's hostname (e.g. 'hasp/plate').

init.title: Map Buttons to Entities
init.description:
Assign a Home Assistant entity to each discovered button. Press buttons on your panel first to discover them, then come back here to assign entities.

Format: pXbY = Page X, Button Y
